# Retro Tetris

> A free retro-style Tetris game playable in any modern browser, with multiple game modes and installable as a PWA.

Retro Tetris offers Classic, Extra, Speedrun and Versus game modes, smooth keyboard controls, a hold-piece slot, ghost piece, progressive difficulty and a high-score system. Built with React, TypeScript and Vite.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Main menu — choose a game mode and configure settings.
- [Classic Mode](/game): Traditional Tetris with progressive difficulty.
- [Extra Mode](/game/extra): Enhanced experience with extra pieces and challenges.
- [Speedrun Mode](/game/speedrun): Clear grey target blocks as fast as possible.
- [Versus Mode](/game/versus): Local head-to-head two-player battle.
